name: codex-augment-dispatcher
description: A polished owner-agent dispatcher for reliable cross-harness delivery, dynamic workflow artifacts, MCP helpers, subagent fanout, high-quality media guidance, GSAP motion guidance, deterministic asset workflows, and automatic ui-ux-closed-loop orchestration with external-skill bootstrap guidance.

interface.shortDescription: Auto-route complex work, UI/UX loops, subagents, frontend/media helpers, reviews, and evidence.
interface.longDescription: Codex Augment Dispatcher is an adapter hub for owner-agent orchestration across Codex, Pi, Claude Code, Grok, and similar CLIs. It keeps one owner responsible for edits and final claims while routing specialist work through reliable-agent-workflow, dynamic-workflow, task-gate/thinking-gate, grok-augment, AGY frontend, GSAP/ScrollTrigger motion guidance, asset-slicer, mcp-generator, dispatcher MCP tools, and ui-ux-closed-loop. It supports platform-neutral workflow artifacts, approval gates, packet/result lifecycles, launch recipes for real subagent fanout and worker-agent fanout, record-result ingestion, Claude Code Dynamic Workflows / ultracode / .claude/workflows interop, high-quality image/video asset defaults, and deterministic generated-asset checks. SVG and emoji are prohibited as default visual assets; custom icons default to image_gen sheets sliced with asset-slicer. UI/UX automation now includes bundled SessionStart/UserPromptSubmit hooks that auto-create fallback project instructions when AGENTS.md is missing and auto-route full-page, redesign, ugly/no-planning, product-facing, high-polish, or wireframe/design-system prompts through ui-ux-closed-loop without requiring users to remember skill names. External design and verification skills such as frontend-design, ui-ux-pro-max, wireframe prototyping, Vercel guidelines, and official GSAP skills are referenced by install guidance and can be installed by model-triggered bootstrap after explicit opt-in rather than vendored wholesale.
defaultPrompt: Auto-classify non-trivial work; routed helpers require Plugin evidence.
Full-page/ugly/no-planning UI auto-routes through ui-ux-closed-loop before AGY implementation.
Missing AGENTS.md: fallback hooks auto-create UI/UX rules; uiux_bootstrap is only for externals.
